name: Flying J Travel Center #761

description: Independent Sinclair-branded travel center with 16 fueling islands, marble showers, coin laundry and an on-site grill and deli.

name: Love's Travel Stop #888
description: 24-hour Love's Travel Stop with an on-site Carl's Jr., showers and roughly 90 truck parking spaces.

name: Flying J Travel Center #764
description: 24-hour Flying J travel center with a CAT scale, truck service, showers, laundry and overnight truck parking.

name: TA Express Rock Springs
description: TA Express travel center offering fuel, food and about 65 overnight truck parking spaces at Exit 104.

name: Love's Travel Stop #310
description: 24-hour Love's with a CAT scale, Subway and Chester's Chicken, tire sales and repair, showers and laundry in a remote high-desert stretch.

name: Flying J Travel Center #763
description: 24-hour Flying J travel center at Exit 209 with a CAT scale, 11 showers, laundry and truck parking.

name: TA Rawlins
description: Full-service TravelCenters of America with Subway, County 6 Bar & Grill, 12 showers, scales, laundry and roughly 188 truck parking spaces.

name: CAT Scale - TA Ft. Bridger
description: Certified CAT Scale for weighing trucks located at the TA Ft. Bridger travel center.

name: CAT Scale - Rock Springs
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Rock Springs Flying J travel center at Exit 104.

name: CAT Scale - Wamsutter
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Love's Travel Stop at Exit 173 in Wamsutter.

name: CAT Scale - Rawlins
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Rawlins Flying J travel center at Exit 209.

name: Boss Truck Shop #53
description: Commercial truck and tire repair shop offering new and retread tires at the Rawlins Flying J off Exit 209.

name: Reliable Truck Repair & Tire Service
description: Independent 24/7 semi-truck repair and tire service shop in Rawlins offering roadside assistance.

name: Wyoming Trucks Wash and Lube
description: Local truck and vehicle wash and lube facility in Rock Springs (daytime hours, closed Sundays).

name: Evanston I-80 Port of Entry
description: Wyoming Highway Patrol port of entry and weigh station on eastbound I-80 just inside the Utah line where commercial vehicles must stop as directed.

name: Rawlins I-80 Weigh Station
description: Westbound I-80 weigh station near Rawlins where commercial vehicles stop when open (often reported closed/intermittent).

name: I-80 Truck Parking Area East (Fort Bridger)
address: I-80 Exit 34, east of the chain-removal area
description: WYDOT truck parking area near Exit 34 with about 93 spaces, restrooms and 24/7 security surveillance, adjacent to the chain-removal area.

name: Lyman Rest Area / Wyoming Welcome Center
description: Bidirectional WYDOT rest area and welcome center at mile marker 41 with restrooms, picnic and pet areas and separate truck parking.

name: Little America Hotel & Resort
description: Highway hotel and resort co-located with the Little America fuel center at Exit 68, with large truck-accessible parking and an on-site restaurant.

name: Petro Stopping Center Laramie #303
description: Petro/TA travel center at I-80 Exit 310 (Curtis St) with showers, restaurant, truck service shop and a CAT Scale.

name: Love's Travel Stop #723
description: Love's Travel Stop at I-80 Exit 310 with Carl's Jr., diesel lanes, showers and roughly 82 truck parking spaces.

name: Pilot Travel Center #402
description: Pilot travel center on I-80 at Exit 367 (Campstool Rd) with Subway, showers, laundry and an on-site CAT Scale.

name: TA Cheyenne
description: TravelCenters of America truck stop at I-80 Exit 377 (Burns, east of Cheyenne) with Exxon fuel, showers, laundry, truck service and about 140 truck parking spaces.

name: Flying J Travel Center #759
description: Pilot Flying J at the I-80/I-25 interchange (signed I-25 Exit 7, College Dr / Swan Ranch), with showers, laundry, food court and an on-site CAT Scale serving I-80 freight.

name: Love's Travel Stop #220
description: Love's Travel Stop at the I-80/I-25 interchange (signed I-25 Exit 7, College Dr) in southwest Cheyenne, serving I-80 traffic with fuel, food and showers.

description: Independent Sinclair/Ampride truck stop at I-80 Exit 401 near the Nebraska line with A&W, showers, diesel lanes, tire care and truck repair bays.

name: CAT Scale at Petro Laramie #303
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the Petro/TA travel center at I-80 Exit 310 in Laramie.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot #402
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the Pilot Travel Center on I-80 at Exit 367 (Campstool Rd) in Cheyenne.

name: CAT Scale at Flying J #759
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Flying J Travel Center at the I-80/I-25 interchange (I-25 Exit 7) in Cheyenne.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Cheyenne
description: Blue Beacon full-service truck and trailer wash at the I-80/I-25 interchange (I-25 Exit 7, Etchepare Dr) serving I-80 traffic, open 24 hours.

name: TA Truck Service Rawlins
description: On-site TA truck service shop at I-80 Exit 214 offering commercial tire service, diagnostics and roadside repair.

name: Petro Truck Service Laramie
description: On-site Petro/TA truck service center at I-80 Exit 310 providing commercial tire sales, service and repair.

name: TA Truck Service Cheyenne
description: On-site TA truck service shop at I-80 Exit 377 (Burns) offering commercial tire and mechanical repair.

name: Cheyenne I-80 Port of Entry
description: Wyoming Highway Patrol commercial port of entry / weigh facility on I-80 at Cheyenne where commercial vehicles must stop as directed by signs.

name: Fort Steele Rest Area
description: WYDOT bidirectional rest area at I-80 Exit 228 (mile marker 228) east of Rawlins with expanded truck parking added under the I-80 Winter Freight project, restrooms and picnic area.

name: Wagonhound Rest Area
description: WYDOT bidirectional rest area near mile marker 267 (Elk Mountain area) with separate truck and passenger parking, restrooms and picnic tables.

name: Quealy Dome Truck Parking
description: WYDOT truck parking area near mile marker 290 west of Laramie, expanded with additional truck spaces under the I-80 Winter Freight/BUILD project.

name: Summit Rest Area (Sherman Summit)
description: WYDOT bidirectional rest area at mile marker 323, the highest point on I-80 (elev. 8,640 ft) between Laramie and Cheyenne, with separate truck parking, restrooms and the Lincoln Memorial Monument.

name: Pine Bluffs Rest Area / Information Center
description: WYDOT welcome center and bidirectional rest area at I-80 Exit 401 near the Nebraska state line with separate truck and passenger parking, restrooms and covered picnic areas.
